violations.text: Raw animal foods such as liquid eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as smoothie bases in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of ice accumulation food residue, and/or other debris: 1. interior of french fry freezer 2. walk-in freezer 3. area around slush machine 4. ice machine New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2025
3 bay sink discharge pipe leaking into bucket during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2025

Ice buildup observed in the top freezers located in the prep area. Ice buildup shall be broken down to prevent blockage of cold flow. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2023

The floors in the walk-in cooler observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
